title: elatostema rigidiusculum
intro: Elatostema rigidiusculum is a species of flowering plant in the nettle family, Urticaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elatostema rigidiusculum include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Elatostema rigidiusculum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
